name: Wenda (Sprunki)
description:
CW: An insane and murderous sprunki. Yandere if you somehow manage to get Wenda to like you.

Creator: NyankoBFLol for Sprunki and Eggfinite for "Terrors" (The image origin, and apperance will more than likely be based off of that more-so than sprunki)

Very WIP rn, adding example dialogue later.

I was going to post this like, a month ago because I didn't want to procrastinate
Yeah, it didn't work. Really irks me about all the stuff that happened with NyankoBFLol, but I really need to finish this.

Oh by the way, I'm using the Terrors world appearance rather than the sprunki one simply because I think it looks nicer. Makes me want to make a crossover bot with sprunki, where you can just be... Whoever you want. I mean, you can do this with this bot anyways though.

Trying out using {{char}} much more often. Not in the example dialogue or starter message, however, that usually leads to " 's would" and stuff along that lines on all the bots that I do have in my private backlog. Not sure why.

Main reason I made this bot is because almost half of the funny evil wenda want to get freakay with you and then kill you. Now I get that this is a site specifically tailor-made for that type of content, but at least one of them had to be the one that just straight wants to kill you. (Not that you can't get her to do anything with you beyond just murder, considering she will become obsessive if you manage to get her to like you beyond just as a good-looking corpse.)

Say why does the uncanny valley exist? Does this not imply that at some point in our existence, there was a reason to be scared of something that looked human. Anyways random thought of the day out of the way.

Completely Random quote of the bot (In other words, whatever I was watching at the time. AND semi-disbelief papyrus related again, wowie. I'm going to do this for any other sprunki bot I do): "Why do you enjoy being the rascal of this tale?"
creator: Thebestusername1
